title: Tulungagung Heat Wave
lead: Tulungagung is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.71. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, posing significant risks to its residents.
body:
The current heat wave in Tulungagung has a score of 10.0/10, indicating an extremely high level of severity. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 12.0 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, resulting in a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 65%, and the wind speed is at 2.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the heat wave's impact on Tulungagung's residents and infrastructure.
